case_title: HENRY HUANG VS. DENISE ARNETTE THOMPSON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $150 SERVED MAR-16-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, DENISE ARNETTE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2023 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF HENRY HUANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENISE ARNETE THOMPSON IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HUANG, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, DENISE ARNETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: BAD ADDRESS. PER THE DEFENDANTS MOTHER, DEFENDANT NO LONGER LIVES AT THE ADDRESS PROVIDED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, DENISE ARNETTE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-12-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HENRY HUANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENISE ARNETTE THOMPSON IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-15-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-15-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2023 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF SERVICE TO MAY-25-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HENRY HUANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENISE ARNETTE THOMPSON IS NOT PRESENT. HONORABLE PANG LY ALLOWS PROOF OF SERVICE FILING TO BE CURED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON, DENISE ARNETTE $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,205.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-15-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-12-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2023 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
